query:
INSERT INTO game_item_catalog (item_id, name, description, type, sub_type, rarity, buy_price, sell_price, stackable, max_stack, use_effect, image_url, is_active, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES 
('scroll_weapon_enhance', '武器強化卷軸', '用於強化武器的神秘卷軸。安定值+2以下必定成功，超過安定值有機率失敗退階，極小機率裝備消失。', 'consumable', 'scroll', 'uncommon', 500, 100, 1, 99, '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"weapon_scroll","description":"對武器進行強化，提升武器的攻擊力等基礎數值。安定值範圍內必定成功。"}', NULL, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('scroll_armor_enhance', '防具強化卷軸', '用於強化防具與飾品的神秘卷軸。安定值+2以下必定成功，超過安定值有機率失敗退階，極小機率裝備消失。', 'consumable', 'scroll', 'uncommon', 500, 100, 1, 99, '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"armor_scroll","description":"對防具、飾品進行強化，提升防禦力等基礎數值。安定值範圍內必定成功。"}', NULL, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name), description=VALUES(description), use_effect=VALUES(use_effect), updated_at=UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000;
command:

VALUES 
('scroll_weapon_enhance', '武器強化卷軸', '用於強化武器的神秘卷軸。安定值+2以下必定成功，超過安定值有機率失敗退階，極小機率裝備消失。', 'consumable', 'scroll', 'uncommon', 500, 100, 1, 99, '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"weapon_scroll","description":"對武器進行強化，提升武器的攻擊力等基礎數值。安定值範圍內必定成功。"}', NULL, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('scroll_armor_enhance', '防具強化卷軸', '用於強化防具與飾品的神秘卷軸。安定值+2以下必定成功，超過安定值有機率失敗退階，極小機率裝備消失。', 'consumable', 'scroll', 'uncommon', 500, 100, 1, 99, '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"armor_scroll","description":"對防具、飾品進行強化，提升防禦力等基礎數值。安定值範圍內必定成功。"}', NULL, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name), description=VALUES(description), use_effect=VALUES(use_effect), updated_at=UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000;
